title: Simple cartoon
description: A texture pack that maintains a simple, cartoony aesthetic
body:
**Simple cartoon is a texture pack that wants to keep a simple and cartoony style.**

currently includes things like:

- Weapons and armor

 ![Weapons and armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3f8b29fdf0041371f49923a567aad9ad151c611.png)

- Some wood

![Some wood](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c436224b113aacd9540caf305abba77bb0d0a79.png)

- A lot of things

 ![A lot of things](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2d2bebd05d39197a1092727b303e06da23b45b9.png)

-And much more

The texture pack supports mods like:

- Beans Backpacks
- Chipped
- Dye Depot
- Stairs But Chairs
- Tool trims

The texture pack is still in development, but we plan to implement more textures for other mods.

ps: I started creating the texture pack before other similar texture packs be popular, but I never thought about going that far, so until now I dedicated myself to it and published it.
ps: If you want to support soon I will make a discord so you can contribute
